name: mcp-server

env.placeholder: # run: moose generate hash-token, use the ENV API Key value

docs:
1. Add the export to your moose entry file (app/index.ts):
       export * from "./apis/mcp";
  2. Generate auth tokens:  moose generate hash-token
     Copy the ENV API Key into .env.local as MCP_API_KEY.
  3. Start moose dev — your MCP server will be at http://localhost:4000/tools
  4. Add the chat UI:  moose add chat --dir <web-app-dir>
